{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204045630BE5F91D545C2799DDC"}"},"total":267},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7357297258382754622","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不要啰嗦，速度更新，像你书中简介里那样做大做强，再创辉煌。快！快！快！[大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713007230,"group_id":"7341210621356018712","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"待到秋来九月八，马踏东京赏樱花","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+TbOlNNU59Sgqxk8unc03s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bfa583bf59644612a75fa125fdeb42d0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707251&x-signature=8K0IU%2FCi2iVgokGmAA9h%2FNBN8BA%3D","user_id":"50470396032","user_name":"恰同学。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50470396032","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341210621356018712","book_info":{"abstract":"（都市、废土双向往返穿越，无系统，剧情向，爽文，都市唯我独法）
陈言，二十四岁，性别：男，爱好：女，标准社畜。
本应该老老实实、安安心心的当一辈子绿油油的韭菜，任人宰割。却偏偏获得了自由往返于当前现实世界和未来废土末世的能力。
如果能自由穿越两界之前，他是绿油油的韭菜。能自由穿越两界之后，他还是绿油油的韭菜，那他妈不是白穿越了吗？
所以人生在世，他得留下一些自己的痕迹。
在那令人绝望的废土末世，他要打下大大的疆土，重新建立起属于人类的文明。
在同样令人绝望的现实，他要引领时代的发展，给所有人翻译翻译，什么他妈的叫他妈的高科技公司！
总有一天，每一张通行世界的钞票上，都得印上他的头像！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o81366a983456f48034f9a297d90074d5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我人麻了吖","author_id":"","book_id":"7341210621356018712","book_name":"两界穿梭：我在末世有个家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7341210717124575768","read_count":"10036","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"993916"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"490","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世,黑科技,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6a3162e9fb2a12a946cfd43ff579d39c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307496&x-signature=huGXmpLWHAQIiGxTHoTqqLrwPg8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1081507969767696","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"230"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204045630BE5F91D545C2799DDC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"fo
